sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48180" key="qeoqre/mmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-θρέμμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n48180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maintained by God</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σιγή</foreign> Orae. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg007:p.56C" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.56C.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
